failed_attempts.sql:
WITH desired_comments AS (
  SELECT c.profile_id,
       coalesce(p1.num_followers, 0) + coalesce(p2.num_likes + p2.num_comments, 0) AS relevance
  FROM comment c
  JOIN publication p1 ON c.publication_id = p1.id
  LEFT JOIN profile_relationship r ON p1.id = r.destination_profile_id AND r.origin_profile_id = ( SELECT id FROM profile WHERE username = 'weddingplanner77' )
  LEFT JOIN publication p2 ON r.destination_profile_id = p2.id
  WHERE c.annotation ILIKE '%beach%' OR c.annotation ILIKE '%clothing%' 
  ORDER BY ts_rank(description_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'beach beachwear')) * ( ( coalesce(p1.num_likes + p1.num_comments, 0) ) / (coalesce(c.num_likes, 0) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE publication_id = c.publication_id AND num_likes > 0) )) DESC
)
SELECT profile_id, p.full_name, COALESCE(c.relevance, 0.0) AS relevance
FROM desired_comments c LEFT JOIN profile p ON c.profile_id = p.id
WHERE p.is_private IS FALSE
LIMIT 10;
